reviews.comment:
No aceptan tarjeta de débito o crédito. Solo efectivo.

(Translated by Google)
They do not accept debit or credit cards. Cash only.

reviews.comment:
Sanwich de jamon crudo y pan casero.  Hay muy buenas "puntas de flechas" elaboradas por Los niños del lugar

(Translated by Google)
A sandwich with prosciutto and homemade bread. There are also very good "arrowheads" made by the local children.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbUx1Rk93EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente para parar en el viaje de Trelew a Esquel o viceversa. Los sándwich de crudo y queso son espectaculares y con precio acorde

(Translated by Google)
Excellent stop on the trip between Trelew and Esquel. The ham and cheese sandwiches are fantastic and reasonably priced.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdTUtRE53EAE

reviews.comment:
Los mejores sandwiches ruteros del mundo! Pan casero, manteca y jamón crudo con queso...qué más se puede pedir!

(Translated by Google)
The best road sandwiches in the world! Homemade bread, butter, and raw ham with cheese...what more could you ask for!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBdjh2Wm1nRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Última estación de servicio hasta paso del indio, tener en cuenta eso. Los baños sucios y mal olientes

(Translated by Google)
Last gas station before Paso del Indio, keep that in mind. The bathrooms are dirty and smelly.
